  • Constructor Details

    • RelationshipTest

      public RelationshipTest()

  • Method Details

    • setUp

      public void setUp()

    • testConstructor

      public void testConstructor()
      Tests the constructor of Relationship. Verifies that friendship level starts at 0 and both Sims are correctly associated.

    • testGetFriendshipLevel

      public void testGetFriendshipLevel()
      Tests the getFriendshipLevel method. Ensures that the initial friendship level is 0.

    • testIncreaseFriendship

      public void testIncreaseFriendship()
      Tests the increaseFriendship method. Verifies that friendship increases and levels up after reaching 100 XP.

    • testIncreaseFriendshipModulo

      public void testIncreaseFriendshipModulo()
      Tests the increaseFriendship method with modulo operation. Ensures that level increases correctly when XP exceeds 100 multiple times.

    • testGetOtherSim

      public void testGetOtherSim()
      Tests the getOtherSim method. Verifies that the method correctly returns the other Sim in the relationship.

    • testIncreaseFriendshipBoundary

      public void testIncreaseFriendshipBoundary()
      Tests the increaseFriendship method at boundary conditions. Ensures that friendship levels up exactly when reaching 100 XP.

    • testRelationshipSymmetry

      public void testRelationshipSymmetry()
      Tests the symmetry of the relationship. Verifies that the relationship works identically from both Sims' perspectives.
